script:
set +e
printf '=== ts ===\n'; date -u +%FT%TZ
printf '=== bot+responder services running ===\n'; systemctl list-units --type=service --no-pager --state=running --no-legend | awk '{print $1}' | grep -E '(bot|responder|agent)\.service$' || true
printf '=== home root files matching claude/agent/main ===\n'; ls /home/azureuser/ | grep -iE 'claude|agent|main' || true
printf '=== responder files present ===\n'; ls /home/azureuser/*-responder.py 2>/dev/null || true
printf '=== grep responders for "Claude AI" display name ===\n'; grep -l -i 'claude ai' /home/azureuser/*-responder.py /home/azureuser/*-bot.py 2>/dev/null || true
printf '=== grep responders for hardcoded chat ids (19:*thread.v2) ===\n'; grep -n -E '19:[A-Za-z0-9_-]+@thread\.v2' /home/azureuser/*-responder.py /home/azureuser/*-bot.py 2>/dev/null | head -20 || true
printf '=== mskai-responder routing block (first 150 lines) ===\n'; head -150 /home/azureuser/mskai-responder.py 2>/dev/null || true
printf '=== mskai-responder lines mentioning conversation/chat/reference/send ===\n'; grep -n -E 'conversation|chat_id|chatId|conversationReference|conv_ref|save_ref|post_reply|send_to|target|recipient' /home/azureuser/mskai-responder.py 2>/dev/null | head -60 || true
printf '=== END ===\n'
